rows.label: tev016401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Reggie about salvageable
materials dropped by indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Reggie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Reggie about salvageable
materials dropped by indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Reggie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Reggie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Recently, I happened to destroy the stomach
of a tectinsula in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Some very rare materials fell
out of it, including orange
tequila and topaz wine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those liquids must have
originally been used by the
tectinsula as digestive juices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems that a powerful shock to the abdomen
causes a crystallizing chemical reaction
that turns them into gem-like materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you happen across any tectinsulas
yourself, you should make a point
to destroy their abdomens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Clarissa and I had talked about it a lot—she said
that as Boze Rose's last remaining students, we
should always be proud and act with courage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0009
rows.name:
So I'm not going to cry
or be afraid anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Clarissa never gave in even at
the very end, and I want to fight
in a way that makes her proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0011
rows.name:
And I also want to help find the
Central Life so we can bring her back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Have you heard of dangerous indigens called
duoguills that emit electric shocks?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Boze Rose promised me that
something good would happen if
I destroyed their tentacles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0021
rows.name:
After I destroyed one with a focused
attack, I was able to pick it up
and sell it for a lot of money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Apparently their tentacles are salvageable
materials that can be used for weapon
production and other stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0023
rows.name:
It's just like Boze Rose to know
something like that. I'm so glad
that I decided to go along with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0026
rows.name:
A little while ago, we managed to ambush
a squad of Bias and kill them all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Ha ha! I'll never forget the
look of fear on their faces
when we leapt from the shadows![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0028
rows.name:
I know that won't make up for what they
did to Clarissa and the others...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0029
rows.name:
But Boze Rose and I are going to keep
battling against the xenoforms. We
won't ever forget what they did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0031
rows.name:
That's the spirit, Reggie! Whatever
troubles block your path, you must
clear them without fear or hesitation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Don't shirk your responsibility to
the others. Hold their thoughts
close, and never let the xenos win![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0049
rows.name:
This Ma-non named Jejebba has been
helping me out with my missions lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0050
rows.name:
On one recent mission, he used
this weird radar device to find
some stranded companions of mine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0051
rows.name:
I guess there really are all kinds
of xenoforms. Though I can't forgive
the ones that killed Clarissa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0052
rows.name:
Still, I'm going to stop
resenting alien races just
because they're different from us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0053
rows.name:
Could this be some of that
"enlightenment" stuff that Boze
Rose is always talking about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0055
rows.name:
You finally begin to
understand. Well done, son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0056
rows.name:
The way of the Buddha is seeing the soul
within instead of the form without.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0060
rows.name:
BLADE used to be full of
Boze Rose's disciples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0061
rows.name:
They were exceptional people who
bravely challenged some of the most
difficult missions BLADE had to offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0062
rows.name:
And that's why so many of them have...lost their lives.
In fact, I believe there's only one other BLADE in active
duty besides myself who studied under Boze Rose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016401_MSG0063
rows.name:
So I can understand why he
treats us like family.[ST:wait ]
